title: [4.1] Simulate dual-stack binds when using WSL
body:
Backports #14026 to 4.1 

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
Workaround a WSL issue with rootless networking where dual-stack binds against the default 0.0.0.0 address are not properly forwarded 
```
